items.html: That is: ZA [Zeir Anpin] takes his portion and her portion, for he is a firstborn son. Thus he first took his Kli [vessel] and hers, in the back alone, from the discernment of MA and BON, and likewise in this manner with the Lights. It follows that there are now in him MA and BON in the Light of Neshama [soul], and the inner Kli is his; and likewise for the Nukva [female].
